user_intent_preservation.original_goal: Migrate 3-phase PWM motor control to new AURIX target
user_intent_preservation.functional_behavior: Generate 3-phase inverter PWM on GTM TOM1 Cluster_1 with center-aligned, complementary HS/LS pairs on P02.0/P02.7 (U), P02.1/P02.4 (V), P02.2/P02.5 (W) at 20 kHz with 1 µs rising/falling deadtime; synchronized start and synchronized duty updates; duty in percent with U=25, V=50, W=75 and +10% step with wrap; add empty IfxGtm_periodEventFunction(); add GTM ATOM ISR (priority 20) to toggle P13.0; main calls init, then repeatedly updates duty and waits 500 ms.
user_intent_preservation.technical_approach: Upgrade from IfxGtm_Tom_PwmHl to unified high-level IfxGtm_Pwm. Guard GTM enablement with IfxGtm_isEnabled/IfxGtm_enable; enable FXCLK via IfxGtm_Cmu_enableClocks (IFXGTM_CMU_CLKEN_FXCLK) selecting cmuFxclk0 in config; map TOM1 Cluster_1 TOUTs for P02.* using IfxGtm_PinMap_TC38x_516 and IfxGtm_PinMap_setTomTout; configure center-aligned PWM with complementary outputs and 1 µs deadtime; start channels synchronously and use non-immediate update APIs for synchronized duty changes. Configure ATOM0 CH0 SR0 interrupt source at 1 kHz using IfxGtm_Atom_Timer and IfxSrc to toggle P13.0.

driver_selection.selection_rationale: User explicitly requested migration from IfxGtm_Tom_PwmHl to the unified high-level IfxGtm_Pwm for TOM. IfxGtm_Pwm is available in the template, supports center-aligned PWM, synchronized start/updates, complementary outputs, and deadtime control via provided APIs.

runtime_function.name: updateGtmTom3phInvDuty
runtime_function.purpose: Apply +10% step to U/V/W duty with wrap rule, and perform synchronized duty updates for the 3 complementary PWM pairs.

migration_notes.context_preserved: All user-required behavior is retained: TOM1 Cluster_1 center-aligned PWM with complementary HS/LS outputs on P02 pins, synchronized start and updates, 20 kHz frequency and 1 µs deadtime, guarded GTM enablement and FXCLK0 enablement, preserved function names (initGtmTom3phInv, updateGtmTom3phInvDuty, IfxGtm_periodEventFunction), main loop delay behavior, and ATOM ISR to toggle P13.0. Timer PinMap is handled using IfxGtm_PinMap_TC38x_516 via IfxGtm_PinMap_setTomTout. Note: Verify exact TOM1 Cluster_1 TOUT mappings for P02.[0,7], P02.[1,4], P02.[2,5] in the TC38x 516-pin PinMap and pair HS/LS to complementary TOM channels before build.

PWM.rationale: Driver locked by refiner node (user explicit or engine-scored)
